__fixture__.name: admin_audit_policy_rollback_last_known_good
__fixture__.scenario: An org admin rolls the tenant policy bundle back to its last-known-good version after a refresh introduced an authoring mistake. The admin-audit packet names the before / after bundle versions and policy epochs, the typed decision reason, and an explainability envelope that a local admin desktop can render without calling the vendor console.
contract_sections: Admin-audit packet row anatomy / Event taxonomy
Admin-audit packet row anatomy / Scope, actor, target axes
Admin-audit packet row anatomy / Policy and entitlement epoch

decision_reason_note: Org admin rolled the acme_prod tenant bundle back to its last-known-good version after discovering a narrowing authoring mistake.

tenant_scope.scope_note: Rollback applies to the managed-desktop install-profile card across the production tenant.

actor_ref.actor_note: Authenticated org admin acting through a fresh session.

target_refs.target_note: Tenant-scoped bundle rolled back from 3.8.0 to 3.7.2.

before_after_state.transition_note: Rollback selects the last-known-good bundle. No new narrowing is introduced; the authoring-mistake narrowing is reverted.

signer_identity.signing_scope_note: Customer-operated trust root; continuity verified at rollback time.

distribution_statuses.note: Rollback delivered via managed push; authoritative-live distribution.

locally_inspectable_fields: Before and after bundle version and policy epoch.
Typed decision reason class and reviewable note.
explainability_envelope.explainability_note: Rollback rationale renders from the packet alone; no vendor console is required.
